footer.tagline: The reliable link between clinic and lab.
footer.copyright: © 2026 LabLink Medical Logistics. Precision every second.

hero.title: The reliable link between clinic and lab
hero.subtitle: LabLink transports medical samples and supplies between clinics and laboratories — on time, every time.

highlights.heading: What We Do
highlights.card1Desc: Safe, compliant transport of diagnostic samples from clinic to laboratory under chain-of-custody conditions.
highlights.card2Desc: Reliable delivery of lab consumables and medical supplies between partner facilities.
highlights.card3Desc: Regular, planned pickup and delivery routes tailored to your clinic and lab schedules.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Contact us to arrange a pickup time that fits your clinic's workflow.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Your samples are transported in compliant, temperature-appropriate containers with full chain-of-custody documentation.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your partner laboratory receives the samples and confirms delivery. Simple, reliable, documented.

cta.heading: Ready to partner with LabLink?
cta.subtext: Optimise your clinical logistics with the market leader in precise specimen transport.

about.heading: Logistics that
about.subtitle: LabLink combines deep medical know-how with advanced technology and a networked clinic-to-lab infrastructure to redefine the diagnostic logistics process.
about.heroStatLabel: On-time delivery rate across our network
about.excellenceSubheading: We are specialists for medical logistics, IT infrastructure and certified quality management.
about.excellence1Desc: Trained couriers, fluent in handling diagnostic substances, ADR Cat. 6.2 and UN3373 packaging.
about.excellence2Desc: Our routing and tracking platform connects clinics, laboratories and couriers in real time.
about.excellence3Desc: ISO-aligned processes, audited handovers and verifiable chain-of-custody for every shipment.
about.techSubtitle: Sensors, structured data and audited transfer points create an unbroken record from pickup to laboratory acceptance.
about.compliance1Desc: Our processes are aligned with the applicable ISO standards for medical logistics.
about.compliance2Desc: Validated containers maintain compliant temperature windows from door to door.
about.compliance3Desc: Patient and clinic data are protected at every step in line with GDPR.
about.ctaHeading: Ready for the future of clinic logistics?
about.ctaSubtitle: Talk to us in a non-binding consultation and discover how our processes integrate seamlessly with yours.

services.heading: Precision in every second.
services.subtitle: We design medical logistics solutions for hospital networks, laboratory groups and emergency couriers — built on real-time tracking and a strict cool chain.
services.coreSubheading: Modular building blocks for every clinic-to-lab workflow.

probenlogistik.title: Specimen logistics
probenlogistik.desc: Compliant transport of diagnostic samples between clinics, MVZs and laboratories — under chain-of-custody and Cat. B / UN3373 requirements.
probenlogistik.feature3: Live status from pickup to handover

medizintechnik.title: Supplies & medical equipment
medizintechnik.desc: Scheduled and on-demand delivery of consumables, reagents and small medical equipment between partner facilities.

onDemand.title: Scheduled & on-demand routes
onDemand.desc: Recurring, fixed pickup and delivery windows that adapt to your clinic and laboratory rhythm.

services.tempSubtext: From −80 °C ultra-cold dry-ice transport to ambient-stable consumables — every shipment runs on validated, monitored hardware with a full audit trail.

contact.heading: We put precision
contact.subheading: Do you have questions about our logistics solutions or need tailored advice? Our team is available to you at any time.
contact.supportSubheading: Dedicated channels for your specific needs. We guarantee a response within four hours.
contact.dept1Desc: Tailored offers for hospital networks and laboratory cooperatives.
contact.dept2Desc: Help integrating Track & Trace or our API into your existing systems.
contact.dept3Desc: Requests for interviews, press materials and partnerships.
contact.faq1Q: How quickly is a courier request processed?
contact.faq1A: You typically receive a confirmation within 15 minutes for urgent transports. Standard enquiries are handled in under 4 hours.
contact.faq2Q: Do you offer GDP-compliant cold-chain transport?
contact.faq2A: Yes — our entire fleet is equipped for temperature-controlled transport (−20 °C to +25 °C) and meets all GDP requirements.

form.name: Full Name
form.subject: Subject
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your clinic or lab, the type of transport you need, and your typical volumes.
form.consent: I agree to LabLink processing my contact data to respond to this enquiry, in accordance with the privacy policy.
form.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
form.messageTooShort: Message must be at least 20 characters.
form.consentRequired: You must agree to the privacy policy to submit.
form.submitSuccess: Message sent! We'll be in touch shortly.
form.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

meta.homeDescription: LabLink transports medical samples and supplies between clinics and laboratories in Germany — on time, every time.
meta.aboutDescription: Learn about LabLink's mission, values, and commitment to reliable medical sample transport.
meta.servicesDescription: Specimen transport, urgent pickups, routine sample runs, and lab supply delivery for clinics and laboratories.
meta.contactDescription: Get in touch with LabLink to discuss courier services for your clinic or laboratory.
